title: How To Receive Methadone
description: Methadone ordering and receiving procedures including Express222, shipment verification, and Methasoft entry.

steps.title: Create the Order in Express222
steps.directionHtml:
1. Go to https://www.express222.com/
  2. Log in
  3. Click Create, Send, and Manage e222 Forms
  4. Select PAI HOLDINGS and click Select and Continue
  5. Click Create New Order
  6. Select Methadone HCL 10mg/mL Oral Solution Cherry
  7. Enter the Quantity needed
  8. Click Save Form and Continue
  9. Click Save and Exit Without Signing

steps.title: Request Signature
steps.directionHtml: Email Ann Jamison at Ann@marichealth.com so she can review and sign the order.

steps.title: Inspect the Shipment
steps.directionHtml:
• Check for damage
  • Verify seal is intact
  • Confirm quantity matches the order

steps.title: Complete the Shipment Form
steps.directionHtml:
1. Go to the emailmeform URL
  2. Fill out using master record info
  3. Scan signed paper and attach
  4. Rename file using the format given

steps.title: Add Medication to Methasoft
steps.directionHtml:
1. Open Methasoft
  2. Click Inventory
  3. Click Add Bulk Inventory
  4. Click Add
  5. Enter number of bottles received
  6. Enter Lot number
  7. Enter Starting number
  8. Ensure Auto Generate Bottle Number is selected

steps.title: Print Bottle Sign-Out Sheet
steps.directionHtml: In Methasoft, print the sign-out sheet for the received inventory.
